/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall -pthread -g CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/tests/integration/test_single_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/src/data_node/rocks_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/src/common/codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/src/common/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/common.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/kv_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/pd_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_single_node.dir/raft_rpc.pb.cc.o -o ../bin/test_single_node   -L/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/librocksdb.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
